title: EQ - Bass, Flat, Bright screens
scenario: EQ preset screens (Bass, Flat, Bright) display locked sliders with correct values and descriptions matching Figma design in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
4. Tap on the 'Bass' preset to select it.
5. Verify that the 'Bass' preset is highlighted/selected.
6. Observe the slider values and descriptions for the Bass preset and compare them to the Figma design.
7. Attempt to drag/adjust any of the EQ sliders and confirm they are locked (not user-adjustable).
8. Tap on the 'Flat' preset to select it.
9. Verify that the 'Flat' preset is highlighted/selected.
10. Observe the slider values and descriptions for the Flat preset and compare them to the Figma design.
11. Attempt to drag/adjust any of the EQ sliders and confirm they are locked (not user-adjustable).
12. Tap on the 'Bright' preset to select it.
13. Verify that the 'Bright' preset is highlighted/selected.
14. Observe the slider values and descriptions for the Bright preset and compare them to the Figma design.
15. Attempt to drag/adjust any of the EQ sliders and confirm they are locked (not user-adjustable).
expected: Each EQ preset (Bass, Flat, Bright) can be selected and is properly applied. Slider values and descriptions match the Figma design for each preset. All sliders are locked (not user-adjustable) when a preset is selected.
